zh.Constantinople, Constantinople, Turkey: 土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Zoe Dukaina於1062年出生在土耳其易斯坦波爾時，她的父親Emperor Konstantinos X Ducas of Byzantine56歲，母親Eudoxie MAKREMBOLITISSA-CERULAIRE40歲。她於1081年10月之後與Prince Adrianos Komnenos在土耳其易斯坦波爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1137年享年75歲。

zh-hans.Constantinople, Constantinople, Turkey: 土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Zoe Dukaina于1062年出生在土耳其易斯坦波爾时，她的父亲Emperor Konstantinos X Ducas of Byzantine56岁，母亲Eudoxie MAKREMBOLITISSA-CERULAIRE40岁。她于1081年10月之后与Prince Adrianos Komnenos在土耳其易斯坦波爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1137年享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Zoe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Greek name meaning ‘life’. This was already in use in Rome towards the end of the classical period (at first as an affectionate nickname), and was popular with the early Christians, who bestowed it with reference to their hopes of eternal life. It was borne by martyrs of the 2nd and 3rd centuries, but was taken up as an English given name only in the 19th century. It has been consistently popular in Britian since the 1970s.

en.lifeSummary: When Zoe Dukaina was born in 1062, in İstanbul, Türkiye, her father, Emperor Konstantinos X Ducas of Byzantine, was 56 and her mother, Eudoxie MAKREMBOLITISSA-CERULAIRE, was 40. She married Prince Adrianos Komnenos after October 1081, in İstanbul, Türkiye. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1137, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Zoe Dukaina est née en 1062, à İstanbul, Turquie, son père, Emperor Konstantinos X Ducas of Byzantine, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Eudoxie MAKREMBOLITISSA-CERULAIRE, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Prince Adrianos Komnenos après octobre 1081, à İstanbul, Turquie. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1137, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Zoe Dukaina 1062 in İstanbul, Türkei geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Emperor Konstantinos X Ducas of Byzantine 56 und ihre Mutter Eudoxie MAKREMBOLITISSA-CERULAIRE 40. Sie hat nach Oktober 1081 in İstanbul, Türkei Prince Adrianos Komnenos geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1137 im Alter von 75 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Zoe Dukaina è nata il nel 1062 nel İstanbul, Turchia, sua padre, Emperor Konstantinos X Ducas of Byzantine, aveva 56 anni e sua madre, Eudoxie MAKREMBOLITISSA-CERULAIRE, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Prince Adrianos Komnenos dopo il ottobre 1081, nel İstanbul, Turchia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1137, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.Constantinople, Constantinople, Turkey: トルコイスタンブルファティイスタンブル
ja.lifeSummary: Zoe Dukainaが1062年にトルコイスタンブルで生まれた時，父Emperor Konstantinos X Ducas of Byzantineは56歳，母Eudoxie MAKREMBOLITISSA-CERULAIREは40歳であった。1081年10月以後にトルコイスタンブルでPrince Adrianos Komnenosと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1137年に75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Zoe Dukaina(이)가 1062년 튀르키예 이스탠불에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Emperor Konstantinos X Ducas of Byzantine(은)는 56세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eudoxie MAKREMBOLITISSA-CERULAIRE(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1081년 10월 이후 튀르키예 이스탠불에서 Prince Adrianos Komnenos(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1137년 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Zoe Dukaina nasceu em 1062, em İstanbul, Turquia, seu pai, Emperor Konstantinos X Ducas of Byzantine, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Eudoxie MAKREMBOLITISSA-CERULAIRE, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Prince Adrianos Komnenos após outubro de 1081, em İstanbul, Turquia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1137, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Zoe Dukaina родилась в 1062 г. в местности истанбул, Турция, её отцу по имени Emperor Konstantinos X Ducas of Byzantine было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Eudoxie MAKREMBOLITISSA-CERULAIRE, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Prince Adrianos Komnenos после октябрь 1081 г. в местности истанбул, Турция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1137 г. в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Zoe Dukaina nació en 1062, en İstanbul, Turquía, su papá, Emperor Konstantinos X Ducas of Byzantine, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Eudoxie MAKREMBOLITISSA-CERULAIRE, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Prince Adrianos Komnenos después de octubre de 1081, en İstanbul, Turquía. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1137, a la edad de 75 años.
